certificate.description: The IronKey Keypad 200 Series are encrypted storage devices that provide a secure way to store and transfer data. User authentication is self-contained via an onboard keypad. User data is protected by hardware-based 256-bit AES encryption to secure sensitive information in the event that the drive is lost or stolen.
